title: Options for future New Zealand censuses: Census Transformation programme | Stats NZ
content:
## Options for future New Zealand censuses: Census Transformation programme
04 April 2013, 11:00am
This paper is one of a series of investigations by the Census Transformation programme identifying and exploring the potential for administrative data sources to provide census-type information.
This paper outlines potential options for future censuses in New Zealand.
These options form the basis for investigative work to assess the feasibility of each option. The emphasis in this paper is on describing administrative census options.
This version forms an initial set of working assumptions. The options will be reviewed periodically as we learn more about them.
